name: Soba Noodles with Grilled Tuna & Soy Ginger S
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub tuna steaks with oil and season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, heat remaining 2 tsp. oil over moderately high heat. Add the garlic and ginger and cook, stirring until slightly colored, about 1 minute.
3. Stir in the stock, vinegar, soy sauce, and 1 tsp. of lemon zest. Add the chile and sugar and bring to a boil.
4. Remove from the heat and stir in the scallions. Keep warm.
5. Bring a pot of water to a boil for the noodles.
6. Grill the tuna for about 5 minutes, turning once, until charred on the outside and pink in the middle. Transfer to a plate and keep warm.
7. Cook the noodles and toss with half of the soy sauce mixture. Mound the noodles on 8 warm plates.
8. Place the tuna on the noodles and spoon the remaining sauce over.
9. In a small bowl, toss the remaining zest with the chives and minced mint and sprinkle over each serving.
10. Garnish with mint and serve immediately.
